Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************

 Results on the reindexing displayed category

 In this file, we collect results on the displayed category obtained
 by reindexing.

 Content:
 1. Transport lemmas and [idtoiso] in the reindexing
 2. Characterization of displayed isomorphisms
 3. Univalence
 4. Characterization of cartesian and opcartesian morphisms
 5. Cleaving
 6. Functor from reindexing
 7. Mapping property
 8. Reindexing along opfibrations gives pullbacks
 9. Reindexing of functors
 10. Reindexing of natural transformations
 11. Pseudofunctoriality of reindexing

 ********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.

Local Open Scope mor_disp.
Local Open Scope cat.

(** ** Reindexing *)

Section Reindexing.
  Local Open Scope mor_disp.
  Local Open Scope cat.

  Context {C' C : category}
          (F : functor C' C)
          (D : disp_cat C).

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_ob_mor C'

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_ob_mor C'

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ x y : C', D (F x) → D (F y) → C' ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
UU
 exact (xx -->[# F f] yy).
  Defined.

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_id_comp C' reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_id_comp C' reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x : C') (xx : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x : C') (xx : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x: C'
xx: D (F x)
xx -->[ # F (identity x)] xx

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x: C'
xx: D (F x)
# F (identity x) = ?Goal0
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x: C'
xx: D (F x)
xx -->[ ?Goal0] xx

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x: C'
xx: D (F x)
xx -->[ identity (F x)] xx
 apply id_disp.
    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : reindex_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
# F (f · g) = ?Goal
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
xx -->[ ?Goal] zz

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
xx -->[ # F f · # F g] zz
 exact (ff ;; gg).
  Defined.

  Definition reindex_disp_cat_data : disp_cat_data C'
    := (_ ,, reindex_disp_cat_id_comp).

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_axioms C' reindex_disp_cat_data

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_cat_axioms C' reindex_disp_cat_data

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy),
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy),
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (functor_id F y)
           (id_disp yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z w : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : C' ⟦ z, w ⟧) (xx : D (F x)) (yy : D (F y))
(zz : D (F z)) (ww : D (F w)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ # F g] zz) (hh : zz -->[ # F h] ww),
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy ww)
           (functor_comp F g h) (gg ;; hh)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)), isaset (xx -->[ # F f] yy)

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy),
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff) = ?b
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
?b = transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff)) = ?b

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) (id_disp xx ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧

transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))

  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left (# F f)) ff) =

C', C: category

f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))

   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

      
C', C: category

transportf (mor_disp xx yy)

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths # F (id_left f)) ff

      unfold transportb; apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy),
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (functor_id F y)
           (id_disp yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (ff ;; id_disp yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @

transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths # F (id_right f)) ff

      unfold transportb; apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z w : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : C' ⟦ z, w ⟧) (xx : D (F x)) (yy : D (F y))
(zz : D (F z)) (ww : D (F w)) (ff : xx -->[ # F f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ # F g] zz) (hh : zz -->[ # F h] ww),
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy ww)
           (functor_comp F g h) (gg ;; hh)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy ww)
           (functor_comp F g h) (gg ;; hh)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy ww)
           (functor_comp F g h) (gg ;; hh)) = ?b
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
        (! functor_comp F g h)) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))

        (! functor_comp F g h)) (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))) =

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧

yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)) =

  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh))

  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)) =

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧

zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)

gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh)) = ?b
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧

yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C

zz: D (F z)

gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz

  (maponpaths # F (assoc f g h))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
     (functor_comp F (f · g) h)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
        (ff ;; gg) ;; hh)) =

  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)

F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C

C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
  (maponpaths # F (assoc f g h) @
   functor_comp F (f · g) h)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F g)
        (# F (f · g)) (# F h) (! functor_comp F f g))
     (ff ;; gg ;; hh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportb (mor_disp xx ww)
  (maponpaths # F (assoc f g h) @
   functor_comp F (f · g) h)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F g)
        (# F (f · g)) (# F h) (! functor_comp F f g))
     (ff ;; gg ;; hh)) = ?b
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C'
f: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C' ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C' ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
zz: D (F z)
ww: D (F w)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
gg: yy -->[ # F g] zz
hh: zz -->[ # F h] ww
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F g)
     (# F (f · g)) (# F h) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   ! (maponpaths # F (assoc f g h) @
      functor_comp F (f · g) h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh) =
transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
  (! assoc (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_comp F g h) @
   ! functor_comp F f (g · h)) (ff ;; gg ;; hh)

      unfold transportb; apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D (F x))
(yy : D (F y)), isaset (xx -->[ # F f] yy)
 intros; apply homsets_disp.
  Qed.

  Definition reindex_disp_cat : disp_cat C'
    := (_ ,, reindex_disp_cat_axioms).

  (** ** A functor of displayed categories from reindexing *)

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor F reindex_disp_cat D

  
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor F reindex_disp_cat D

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data F reindex_disp_cat D
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F reindex_disp_cat D,
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data F reindex_disp_cat D
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x)
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C') (xx : reindex_disp_cat x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat y) (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x)
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : C', D (F x) → D (F x)
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x: C'
D (F x) → D (F x)
 exact (idfun _ ).
      
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C') (xx : reindex_disp_cat x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat y) (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy)
  ((λ x : C', idfun (D (F x)))
   :
   ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x))
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
∏ (x y : C') (xx : D (F x)) (yy : D (F y))
(f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ # F f] yy → xx -->[ # F f] yy
 
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
x, x': C'
d: D (F x)
d': D (F x')
f: C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧
d -->[ # F f] d' → d -->[ # F f] d'
  exact (idfun _ ).
    
C', C: category
F: C' ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F reindex_disp_cat D,
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (((λ x : C', idfun (D (F x)))
    :
    ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x)),,
   ((λ (x x' : C') (d : D (F x)) (d' : D (F x'))
     (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧), idfun (d -->[ # F f] d'))
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x),
     ∏ (x y : C') (xx : reindex_disp_cat x)
     (yy : reindex_disp_cat y) (f : C' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy)
      ((λ x : C', idfun (D (F x)))
       :
       ∏ x : C', reindex_disp_cat x → D (F x))))
 abstract (
          split;
          [intros; apply idpath |];
          intros; apply idpath
        ).
  Defined.
End Reindexing.

(**
 1. Transport lemmas and [idtoiso] in the reindexing
 *)

C', C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: C' ⟶ C
x, y: C'
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
f, g: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) p ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (maponpaths # F p) ff


C', C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: C' ⟶ C
x, y: C'
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
f, g: C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) p ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (maponpaths # F p) ff

  induction p ; apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D: disp_cat C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
p: x = y
xx: D (F x)
transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) p xx =
transportf D (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) p) xx


C₁, C₂: category
D: disp_cat C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
p: x = y
xx: D (F x)
transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) p xx =
transportf D (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) p) xx

  
C₁, C₂: category
D: disp_cat C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
xx: D (F x)
xx = xx

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, xx': D (F x)
p: xx = xx'
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx')
  (functor_id F x) (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) p)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, xx': D (F x)
p: xx = xx'
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx')
  (functor_id F x) (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) p)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx: D (F x)
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (idpath xx)) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath xx))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, x': C₁
xx: D (F x)
xx': D (F x')
p: x = x'
pp: transportf (λ z : C₁, D (F z)) p xx = xx'
transportf D (maponpaths F p) xx = xx'


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, x': C₁
xx: D (F x)
xx': D (F x')
p: x = x'
pp: transportf (λ z : C₁, D (F z)) p xx = xx'
transportf D (maponpaths F p) xx = xx'

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, xx': D (F x)
pp: xx = xx'
xx = xx'

  exact pp.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, x': C₁
xx: D (F x)
xx': D (F x')
p: x = x'
pp: transportf (λ z : C₁, D (F z)) p xx = xx'
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x' ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx')
  (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F p)
  (idtoiso_disp (maponpaths F p)
     (idtoiso_reindex_disp_cat'_path pp))


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, x': C₁
xx: D (F x)
xx': D (F x')
p: x = x'
pp: transportf (λ z : C₁, D (F z)) p xx = xx'
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x' ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx')
  (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F p)
  (idtoiso_disp (maponpaths F p)
     (idtoiso_reindex_disp_cat'_path pp))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, xx': D (F x)
pp: xx = xx'
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx')
  (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F (idpath x))
  (idtoiso_disp (maponpaths F (idpath x))
     (idtoiso_reindex_disp_cat'_path pp))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx: D (F x)
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp xx) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx: D (F x)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp xx) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx: D (F x)
! functor_id F x = pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso F (idpath x)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(**
 2. Characterization of displayed isomorphisms
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
xx -->[ identity_z_iso x] yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ?ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
xx -->[ identity_z_iso x] yy
 exact (transportb
             (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
             (functor_id _ _)
             i).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (functor_id F x) i)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso x)] xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
?pr1 ;; transportb
          (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
          (functor_id F x) i =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp yy)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; transportb
                 (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
                 (functor_id F x) i =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso x)) (id_disp yy),
 transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
   (functor_id F x) i ;; ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
   (id_disp xx)) ?pr10

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso x)] xx
 exact (transportb
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (functor_id _ _)
               (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) ;; 
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F x) i =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp yy)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, transportf _ _ z) (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor i) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         refine (!_) ;
         etrans ; [ apply transportf_reindex | ] ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply homset_property).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
(λ _ : transportb
         (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
         (functor_id F x) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) ;; 
       transportb
         (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
         (functor_id F x) i =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso x)) (id_disp yy),
 transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
   (functor_id F x) i ;; transportb
                           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
                            yy -->[ z] xx)
                           (functor_id F x)
                           (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
   (id_disp xx))
  (z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex_subproof C₁ C₂ F D
     x xx yy i)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, transportf _ _ z) (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp i) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         refine (!_) ;
         etrans ; [ apply transportf_reindex | ] ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
xx -->[ identity_z_iso (F x)] yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) ?ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
xx -->[ identity_z_iso (F x)] yy
 exact (transportf
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (functor_id _ _)
               i).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (functor_id F x) i)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (F x))] xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
?pr1 ;; transportf
          (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
          (functor_id F x) i =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp yy)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; transportf
                 (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
                 (functor_id F x) i =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp yy),
 transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
   (functor_id F x) i ;; ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
   (pr1 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp xx)) ?pr10

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (F x))] xx
 exact (transportf
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (functor_id _ _)
               (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) ;; 
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F x) i =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp yy)
 abstract
        (unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
         [ apply maponpaths ;
           pose (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor i) as p ;
           cbn in p ;
           exact (transportf_transpose_right p)
         | ] ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
         [ apply maponpaths ;
           apply transportf_reindex
         | ] ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply homset_property).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
(λ _ : transportf
         (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
         (functor_id F x) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) ;; 
       transportf
         (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
         (functor_id F x) i =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp yy),
 transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
   (functor_id F x) i ;; transportf
                           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
                            yy -->[ z] xx)
                           (functor_id F x)
                           (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
   (pr1 (identity_z_iso (F x))) (id_disp xx))
  (z_iso_disp_reindex_to_z_iso_disp_subproof C₁ C₂ F D
     x xx yy i)
 abstract
        (unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
         [ apply maponpaths ;
           pose (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp i) as p ;
           cbn in p ;
           exact (transportf_transpose_right p)
         | ] ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
         [ apply maponpaths ;
           apply transportf_reindex
         | ] ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
isweq ?f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
 exact z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
isweq z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
∏ x0 : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy,
?g (z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex x0) = x0
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
∏ y : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy,
z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex (?g y) = y

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy
→ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy
 exact z_iso_disp_reindex_to_z_iso_disp.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
∏ x0 : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) xx yy,
z_iso_disp_reindex_to_z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros i ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp | ] ;
         cbn ;
         apply transportfbinv).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x: C₁
xx, yy: D (F x)
∏ y : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx yy,
z_iso_disp_to_z_iso_disp_reindex
  (z_iso_disp_reindex_to_z_iso_disp y) = y
 abstract
        (intros i ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp | ] ;
         cbn ;
         apply transportbfinv).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
yy -->[ # F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))] xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (functor_comp F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))
     f) (?Goal ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) 
  (pr2 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy yy) 
     (functor_id F y) (id_disp yy))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (functor_comp F f
     (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
  (ff ;; ?Goal) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) 
  (pr1 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (functor_id F x) (id_disp xx))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
yy -->[ # F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))] xx
 apply fiso.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (functor_comp F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))
     f)
  ((let X := pr2 fiso in let X0 := pr1 X in X0) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (functor_id F y)
     (id_disp yy))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       refine (maponpaths (transportb _ _) (pr12 Hff) @ _) ;
       refine (!_) ;
       refine (transportf_reindex (F := F) (D := D) _ _ @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply homset_property).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (# F f) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff
fiso:= make_z_iso_disp ff Hff: z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) xx yy
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (functor_comp F f
     (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
  (ff ;; (let X := pr2 fiso in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx))
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       refine (maponpaths (transportb _ _) (pr22 Hff) @ _) ;
       refine (!_) ;
       refine (transportf_reindex (F := F) (D := D) _ _ @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply homset_property).
Defined.

(**
 3. The univalence
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
is_univalent_disp (reindex_disp_cat F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
is_univalent_disp (reindex_disp_cat F D)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x, y: C₁
p: x = y
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
isweq
  (λ ee : transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) p xx = yy,
   idtoiso_disp p ee)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x: C₁
xx, yy: reindex_disp_cat F D x
isweq
  (λ ee : transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) (idpath x)
            xx = yy, idtoiso_disp (idpath x) ee)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x: C₁
xx, yy: reindex_disp_cat F D x
transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) (idpath x) xx = yy
≃ z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) xx yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x: C₁
xx, yy: reindex_disp_cat F D x
?w ~
(λ ee : transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) (idpath x)
          xx = yy, idtoiso_disp (idpath x) ee)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x: C₁
xx, yy: reindex_disp_cat F D x
transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) (idpath x) xx = yy
≃ z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) xx yy
 exact (z_iso_disp_weq_z_iso_disp_reindex xx yy
           ∘ make_weq
               (@idtoiso_disp _ D _ _ (idpath _) xx yy)
               (HD _ _ _ xx yy))%weq.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: is_univalent_disp D
x: C₁
xx, yy: reindex_disp_cat F D x
(z_iso_disp_weq_z_iso_disp_reindex xx yy
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)))
     (HD (F x) (F x) (idpath (F x)) xx yy))%weq ~
(λ ee : transportf (reindex_disp_cat F D) (idpath x)
          xx = yy, idtoiso_disp (idpath x) ee)
 abstract
      (intros p ;
       induction p ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp | ] ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
univalent_category


C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
univalent_category

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
category
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent ?C

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
category
 exact (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F (pr1 D))).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent
  (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F (pr1 D)))
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent C₁
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent_disp (reindex_disp_cat F (pr1 D))

    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent C₁
 exact (pr2 C₁).
    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_univalent_category C₂
is_univalent_disp (reindex_disp_cat F (pr1 D))
 exact (is_univalent_reindex_disp_cat F _ (pr2 D)).
Defined.

(**
 4. Characterization of cartesian and opcartesian morphisms
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
∃! gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
  (gg0 ;; ff) = gg

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
   transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
     (gg0 ;; ff) = gg)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
∑ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
  (gg0 ;; ff) = gg

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
   transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
     (gg0 ;; ff) = gg)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff) ;
       rewrite (transportf_transpose_right (pr2 φ₁)) ;
       rewrite (transportf_transpose_right (pr2 φ₂)) ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
∑ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
  (gg0 ;; ff) = gg
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
zz -->[ # F g] xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
(λ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
 transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
   (gg0 ;; ff) = gg) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
zz -->[ # F g] xx
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
# F (g · f) = # F g · # F f

      abstract
        (apply functor_comp).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D (F z)
gg: zz -->[ # F (g · f)] yy
(λ gg0 : zz -->[ # F g] xx,
 transportb (mor_disp zz yy) (functor_comp F g f)
   (gg0 ;; ff) = gg)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (# F g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F z, F y ⟧, zz -->[ z0] yy)
        (is_cartesian_in_reindex_disp_cat_subproof0 C₁
           C₂ F x y f z g) gg))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite cartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.

Section IsCartesianFromReindexDispCat.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (D : disp_cat C₂)
          (HD : cleaving D)
          {x y : C₁}
          {f : x --> y}
          {xx : D (F x)}
          {yy : D (F y)}
          (ff : xx -->[ #F f ] yy)
          (Hff : @is_cartesian _ (reindex_disp_cat F D) y x f yy xx ff).

  Let ℓ : cartesian_lift yy (# F f) := HD (F y) (F x) (#F f) yy.
  Let m : xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ := cartesian_factorisation
                                    ℓ
                                    (identity _)
                                    (transportb
                                       (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                                       (id_left _)
                                       ff).
  Let minv' : pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
    := transportb
         _
         (maponpaths (λ z, #F z) (id_left _))
         (pr12 ℓ).
  Let minv : pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
    := transportf
         _
         (functor_id _ _)
         (cartesian_factorisation Hff _ minv').

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
minv ;; m =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, ℓ -->[ z] ℓ)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
minv ;; m =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, ℓ -->[ z] ℓ)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx) (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv') ;; 
cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, ℓ -->[ z] ℓ)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx) (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv') ;; 
cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (! id_left (# F f)) ff) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, ℓ -->[ z] ℓ)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
          (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx) (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv') ;; 
cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; ℓ =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, ℓ -->[ z] ℓ)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
          (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ) ;; ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))))
  (id_disp ℓ ;; ℓ)

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))))
  (transportb (mor_disp ℓ yy) (id_left (# F f)) ℓ)

  (cartesian_factorisation Hff

transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)

        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)

  (functor_id F x)

transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x))
        (# F f))
     (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; 
      (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
         (transportf
            (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
            (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; ℓ))) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ

     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x))

     (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; 
      transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x))
        (# F f))
     (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; 
      transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x))
        (# F f))
     (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
        (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
           (! id_left (# F f)))
        (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x)
           minv' ;; ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
?b =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) 
     (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff) =
?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x)
     (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
        (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
           (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x) minv' ;; ff =
?t2

      apply (transportf_transpose_right p).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
        (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
           (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ))) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
        (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
             (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ))) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z) (id_left f) @
   functor_comp F (identity x) f @
   maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
     (! id_left (# F f)) @
   assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
        (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
        (functor_id F x))) (pr12 ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp ℓ yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
             (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))) ℓ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z) (id_left f) @
functor_comp F (identity x) f @
maponpaths (compose (# F (identity x)))
  (! id_left (# F f)) @
assoc (# F (identity x)) (identity (F x)) (# F f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (# F (identity x) · identity (F x))
  (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F (identity x))
     (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
     (functor_id F x)) =
! id_left (# F f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
  (identity (F x) · identity (F x)) (# F f)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
          (identity_is_z_iso (F x))))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m ;; minv =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp xx)

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D (F y)
