ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m ;; minv =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m ;; minv =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; transportf
                                (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
                                (functor_id F x)
                                (cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m') 
  (id_disp xx): transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff =
id_disp xx ;; ff
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' = 
  id_disp xx
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) 
  (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')

     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')

  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (functor_id F x))
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   minv') =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)) @
   functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x))) m'

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
maponpaths (compose (identity (F x))) (functor_id F x) =
id_left (# F (identity x)) @
functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x))

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff)

HD: cleaving D

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

  (transportb

     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;;

  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)

        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx

  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')

     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =

    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff)

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;;

  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
        (id_left (# F (identity x)))) (m' ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) (m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hff (identity x)
                                   (transportb
                                      (mor_disp
                                         (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                      (maponpaths
                                         (λ z : C₁
                                                ⟦ x, y
                                                ⟧,
                                          # F z)
                                         (id_left f))
                                      (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x))
        (# F f))
     (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
        (transportb
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
           (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hff
                                       (identity x)
                                       (transportb
                                          (mor_disp
                                             (pr1 ℓ)
                                             yy)
                                          (maponpaths
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                              # F z)
                                             (id_left
                                                f))
                                          (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    Hff (identity x)
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                       (maponpaths
                                          (λ z : C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                           # F z)
                                          (id_left f))
                                       (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    Hff (identity x)
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                       (maponpaths
                                          (λ z : C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                           # F z)
                                          (id_left f))
                                       (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition 
        (identity (F x)) 
        (# F (identity x)) 
        (# F f) (! functor_id F x)) 
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)

  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)

  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                    Hff (identity x)
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                       (maponpaths
                                          (λ z : C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                           # F z)
                                          (id_left f))
                                       (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff)) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
q:= cartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
q:= cartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x)
     (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
        (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
           (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)
cartesian_factorisation Hff (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)) ;; ff = ?t2

        exact (transportb_transpose_right q).
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; transportb
                                   (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ)
                                      yy)
                                   (! functor_comp F
                                        (identity x) f)
                                   (transportb
                                      (mor_disp
                                         (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                      (maponpaths
                                         (λ z : C₁
                                                ⟦ x, y
                                                ⟧,
                                          # F z)
                                         (id_left f))
                                      (pr12 ℓ))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; transportf
                                     (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ)
                                        yy)
                                     (! (! functor_comp
                                             F
                                             (identity
                                                x) f))
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (pr1 ℓ) yy)
                                        (! maponpaths
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                              # F z)
                                             (id_left
                                                f))
                                        (pr12 ℓ))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; transportf
                                     (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ)
                                        yy)
                                     (! maponpaths
                                          (λ z : C₁
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                           # F z)
                                          (id_left f) @
                                      ! (! functor_comp
                                             F
                                             (identity
                                                x) f))
                                     (pr12 ℓ)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
        (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
             (id_left f) @
         ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)))
     (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
           (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; pr12 ℓ)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; pr12 ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (! id_left (# F f)) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left (# F f)) ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_left (# F f))
        ff))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_left f) @
      ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
   assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_left (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
! id_left (# F f) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
  (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z) (id_left f) @
   ! (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)) @
assoc (identity (F x)) (# F (identity x)) (# F f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (F x) · # F (identity x))
  (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
  (id_left (# F (identity x))) @
! functor_comp F (identity x) f =
! id_left (# F f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
  (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
! functor_comp F (identity x) f

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
