     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =

    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! functor_id F x @
   functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)))
  (id_disp xx) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_left (identity (F x))) (id_disp xx)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m':= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation Hff 
  (identity x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ)): xx -->[ identity (F x) · # F (identity x)] xx
p:= cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m')
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)): transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx) ;; ff)
→ transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
    (id_left (# F (identity x))) m' =
  transportf (mor_disp xx xx) 
    (! functor_id F x) (id_disp xx)
! functor_id F x @
functor_id F x @ ! id_left (identity (F x)) =
! id_left (identity (F x))

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
is_cartesian ff

  (transportb

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
is_z_isomorphism ?h
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
?h · # F f = # F f
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
xx -->[ ?h] ℓ
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' ?h ?Hh) ?hh

     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)

     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
?hh ;; ℓ = transportb (mor_disp xx yy) ?p ff

C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧
 apply identity.

is_z_isomorphism (identity (F x))

  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy

  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff

identity (F x) · # F f = # F f
 apply id_left.

xx -->[ identity (F x)] ℓ
 exact m.

  (functor_id F x)

is_z_iso_disp

yy: D (F y)

m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
ℓ -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
     (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))] xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
?pr1 ;; m =
transportb (mor_disp ℓ ℓ)
  (pr2
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) 
  (id_disp ℓ)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ 
  (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; m =
       transportb (mor_disp ℓ ℓ)
         (pr2
            (make_z_iso' 
               (identity (F x))
               (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) 
         (id_disp ℓ),
 m ;; ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
   (pr1
      (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
         (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) 
   (id_disp xx)) ?pr10

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
ℓ -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
     (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))] xx
 exact minv.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
minv ;; m =
transportb (mor_disp ℓ ℓ)
  (pr2
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ)
 exact minv_m.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
(λ _ : minv ;; m =
       transportb (mor_disp ℓ ℓ)
         (pr2
            (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
               (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp ℓ),
 m ;; minv =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
   (pr1
      (make_z_iso' (identity (F x))
         (identity_is_z_iso (F x)))) (id_disp xx))
  minv_m
 exact m_minv.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F y) (F x) (# F f) yy: cartesian_lift yy (# F f)
m:= cartesian_factorisation ℓ (identity (F x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (# F f)) ff): xx -->[ identity (F x)] pr1 ℓ
minv':= transportb (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) yy)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_left f)) (pr12 ℓ): pr1 ℓ -->[ # F (identity x · f)] yy
minv:= transportf (mor_disp (pr1 ℓ) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity x) minv'): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F x)] xx
m ;; ℓ =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left (# F f)) ff
 apply cartesian_factorisation_commutes.
  Defined.
End IsCartesianFromReindexDispCat.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
∃! gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
  (ff ;; gg0) = gg

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
   transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
     (ff ;; gg0) = gg)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
∑ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
  (ff ;; gg0) = gg

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
   transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
     (ff ;; gg0) = gg)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (opcartesian_factorisation_unique Hff) ;
       rewrite (transportf_transpose_right (pr2 φ₁)) ;
       rewrite (transportf_transpose_right (pr2 φ₂)) ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
∑ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
  (ff ;; gg0) = gg
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
yy -->[ # F g] zz
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
(λ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
 transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
   (ff ;; gg0) = gg) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
yy -->[ # F g] zz
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
# F (f · g) = # F f · # F g

      abstract
        (apply functor_comp).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
z: C₁
zz: D (F z)
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
gg: xx -->[ # F (f · g)] zz
(λ gg0 : yy -->[ # F g] zz,
 transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
   (ff ;; gg0) = gg)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff (# F g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, F z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
        (is_opcartesian_in_reindex_disp_cat_subproof0
           C₁ C₂ F x y f z g) gg))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite opcartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.

Section IsOpCartesianFromReindexDispCat.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (D : disp_cat C₂)
          (HD : opcleaving D)
          {x y : C₁}
          {f : x --> y}
          {xx : D (F x)}
          {yy : D (F y)}
          (ff : xx -->[ #F f ] yy)
          (Hff : @is_opcartesian _ (reindex_disp_cat F D) x y f xx yy ff).

  Let ℓ : opcartesian_lift _ xx (# F f) := HD (F x) (F y) xx (#F f).
  Let m : pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
    := opcartesian_factorisation
         (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian _ ℓ)
         (identity _)
         (transportb
            (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
            (id_right _)
            ff).
  Let minv' : xx -->[ # F (f · identity y) ] pr1 ℓ
    := transportb
         _
         (maponpaths (λ z, #F z) (id_right _))
         (pr12 ℓ).
  Let minv : yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
    := transportf
         _
         (functor_id _ _)
         (opcartesian_factorisation Hff _ minv').

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp yy)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp yy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
p:= opcartesian_factorisation_unique Hff 
  (identity y)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
     (minv ;; m)) (id_disp yy): ff ;; transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (identity (F y)) @
         ! functor_id F y) 
        (minv ;; m) = ff ;; 
id_disp yy
→ transportf
    (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
    (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
    (minv ;; m) = id_disp yy
minv ;; m =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp yy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
     (minv ;; m))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
        (minv ;; m) = ff ;; 
id_disp yy
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (id_disp yy) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) 
  (id_disp yy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
     (minv ;; m))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  ((id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (minv ;; m)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  ((id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (minv ;; m) = minv ;; m

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
isaset (C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
        (minv ;; m) = ff ;; id_disp yy
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y)
        (minv ;; m) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
           (id_left (identity (F y)) @
            ! functor_id F y) (minv ;; m)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
           (id_left (identity (F y)) @
            ! functor_id F y) (minv ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
        (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y))
     (ff ;; (minv ;; m))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; (minv ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; (transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
            (functor_id F y)
            (opcartesian_factorisation Hff
               (identity y) minv') ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)))
     (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
              (functor_id F y)
              (opcartesian_factorisation Hff
                 (identity y) minv') ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))

     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ

  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
          (identity (F y)))
     (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
              (functor_id F y)
              (opcartesian_factorisation Hff
                 (identity y) minv') ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
          (identity (F y)))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
        (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y))
        (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff
                 (identity y) minv') ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y))
     (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
              minv') ;; m) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# F f · # F (identity y))
        (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)))
     (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
              minv' ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv' ;; m) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv' ;; m) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
?b = transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv' ;; m) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' ;; m =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?y'

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
p:= opcartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity y) minv': ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
        (identity y) minv' = minv'
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?y'

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
p:= opcartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity y) minv': transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff
           (identity y) minv') = minv'
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?y'

        exact (transportf_transpose_right p).
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) minv' ;; m) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
        (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
        (functor_comp F f (identity y))) (minv' ;; m)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) (minv' ;; m) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                    (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                       D ℓ)
                                    (identity (F y))
                                    (transportb
                                       (λ z : C₂
                                              ⟦ F x,
                                              F y ⟧,
                                        xx -->[ z] yy)
                                       (id_right
                                          (# F f)) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                      (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                         D ℓ)
                                      (identity (F y))
                                      (transportf
                                         (λ z : C₂
                                                ⟦ 
                                                F x,
                                                F y ⟧,
                                          xx -->[
                                          z] yy)
                                         (! id_right
                                              (# F f))
                                         ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
        (# F (f · identity y)) (identity (F y))
        (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
             (id_right f)))
     (pr12 ℓ ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                     D ℓ) (identity (F y))
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
                      xx -->[ z] yy)
                     (! id_right (# F f)) ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F (f · identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (pr12 ℓ ;; opcartesian_factorisation
               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                  D ℓ) (identity (F y))
               (transportf
                  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
                   xx -->[ z] yy) (! id_right (# F f))
                  ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F (f · identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (! id_right (# F f)) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F (f · identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F (f · identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
     (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths # F (! id_right f)) ff

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
! id_right (# F f) @
cancel_postcomposition (# F f) (# F (f · identity y))
  (identity (F y))
  (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
       (id_right f)) @
cancel_postcomposition (# F (f · identity y))
  (# F f · # F (identity y)) (identity (F y))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y)) @
cancel_postcomposition (# F f · # F (identity y))
  (# F f · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (functor_id F y)) @
! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f))
  (id_left (identity (F y)) @ ! functor_id F y) @
! functor_comp F f (identity y) =
maponpaths # F (! id_right f)

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (id_disp yy) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp yy)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (functor_id F y)
     (id_disp yy)) =
transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left (identity (F y))) (id_disp yy)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp yy yy) (! functor_id F y)
     (id_disp yy)) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (identity (F y))) (id_disp yy)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! functor_id F y @
   functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)))
  (id_disp yy) =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left (identity (F y))) (id_disp yy)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
! functor_id F y @
functor_id F y @ ! id_left (identity (F y)) =
! id_left (identity (F y))

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
m ;; minv =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, pr1 ℓ -->[ z] pr1 ℓ)
  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

HD: opcleaving D

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D (F y)
