ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff) ;; transportf
                                 (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
                                 (functor_id F y)
                                 (opcartesian_factorisation
                                    Hff (identity y)
                                    minv') =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧, pr1 ℓ -->[ z] pr1 ℓ)
  (id_left (identity (F y))) (id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; (opcartesian_factorisation
                                  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                     D ℓ)
                                  (identity (F y))
                                  (transportb
                                     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x,
                                            F y ⟧,
                                      xx -->[ z] yy)
                                     (id_right (# F f))
                                     ff) ;; transportf
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 yy
                                                 (pr1
                                                 ℓ))
                                              (functor_id
                                                 F y)
                                              (opcartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff
                                                 (identity
                                                 y)
                                                 minv')) =
mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; transportb
                                 (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, 
                                        F y ⟧,
                                  pr1 ℓ -->[ z] pr1 ℓ)
                                 (id_left
                                    (identity (F y)))
                                 (id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; (opcartesian_factorisation
                                  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                     D ℓ)
                                  (identity (F y))
                                  (transportf
                                     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x,
                                            F y ⟧,
                                      xx -->[ z] yy)
                                     (! id_right
                                          (# F f)) ff) ;; 
                                transportf
                                  (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
                                  (functor_id F y)
                                  (opcartesian_factorisation
                                     Hff (identity y)
                                     minv')) =
mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; transportf
                                 (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, 
                                        F y ⟧,
                                  pr1 ℓ -->[ z] pr1 ℓ)
                                 (! id_left
                                      (identity (F y)))
                                 (id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; (opcartesian_factorisation
                                     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                        D ℓ)
                                     (identity (F y))
                                     (transportf
                                        (λ z : C₂
                                               ⟦ F x,
                                               F y ⟧,
                                         xx -->[ z] yy)
                                        (! id_right
                                             (# F f))
                                        ff) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff
                                                 (identity
                                                 y)
                                                 minv')) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
        (# F (identity y)))
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                       (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                          D ℓ)
                                       (identity (F y))
                                       (transportf
                                          (λ z : C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 F y ⟧,
                                           xx -->[
                                           z] yy)
                                          (! id_right
                                               (# F f))
                                          ff) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff
                                                 (identity
                                                 y)
                                                 minv')) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
        (# F (identity y)))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_right (# F f)) ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                     Hff (identity y)
                                     minv')) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
          (# F (identity y)))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
        (! id_right (# F f)) ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                     Hff (identity y)
                                     minv')) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y))
          (# F (identity y)))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
        (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
           (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
           (! id_right (# F f)))
        (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff
                 (identity y) minv'))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ ;; id_disp (pr1 ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ)) (id_right (# F f))
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D

  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))

  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (! id_right (# F f))
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y)
           minv') = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
p:= opcartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity y) minv': ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
        (identity y) minv' = minv'
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
p:= opcartesian_factorisation_commutes Hff 
  (identity y) minv': transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff
           (identity y) minv') = minv'
ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff (identity y) minv' =
?t2

      apply (transportf_transpose_right p).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (functor_comp F f (identity y)) minv') =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y))) minv' =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
        (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
     (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
          (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
       (id_right f) @
   functor_comp F f (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
     (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
     (! id_right (# F f)) @
   ! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_id F y))) (pr12 ℓ) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f))
     (! id_left (identity (F y))))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D ℓ)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
! maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z) (id_right f) @
functor_comp F f (identity y) @
cancel_postcomposition (# F f)
  (# F f · identity (F y)) (# F (identity y))
  (! id_right (# F f)) @
! assoc (# F f) (identity (F y)) (# F (identity y)) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_id F y)) =
! id_right (# F f) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f))
  (! id_left (identity (F y)))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (id_right (# F f))
  (opcleaving_mor HD (# F f) xx ;; m)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ

  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (id_right (# F f))
  (opcleaving_mor HD (# F f) xx ;; m)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (id_right (# F f))
  (opcleaving_mor HD (# F f) xx ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                        D ℓ)
                                     (identity (F y))
                                     (transportb
                                        (λ z : C₂
                                               ⟦ F x,
                                               F y ⟧,
                                         xx -->[ z] yy)
                                        (id_right
                                           (# F f)) ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff =
transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (id_right (# F f))
  (transportb (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
ff = ff

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_opcartesian ff

ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)

  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))

     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

  (functor_id F y)

     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_opcartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f))
     (opcleaving_mor HD (# F f) xx ;; m))

 apply mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian.

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_z_isomorphism (identity (F y))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' (identity (F y)) ?Hf) m

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_z_isomorphism (identity (F y))
 apply identity_is_z_iso.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
     (identity_is_z_iso (F y))) m
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
yy -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
     (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))] opcleaving_ob HD
                                   (# F f) xx
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
?pr1 ;; m =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr2
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) 
  (id_disp yy)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; m =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2
            (make_z_iso' 
               (identity (F y))
               (identity_is_z_iso (F y))))
         (id_disp yy),
 m ;; ?pr1 =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx)
      (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx))
   (pr1
      (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
         (identity_is_z_iso (F y))))
   (id_disp (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx))) 
  ?pr10

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
yy -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
     (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))] opcleaving_ob HD
                                   (# F f) xx
 exact minv.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
minv ;; m =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr2
     (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
        (identity_is_z_iso (F y)))) (id_disp yy)
 apply op_minv_m.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D (F x)
yy: D (F y)
ff: xx -->[ # F f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
ℓ:= HD (F x) (F y) xx (# F f): opcartesian_lift D xx (# F f)
m:= opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D ℓ)
  (identity (F y))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (id_right (# F f)) ff): pr1 ℓ -->[ identity (F y)] yy
minv':= transportb (mor_disp xx (pr1 ℓ))
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧, # F z)
     (id_right f)) (pr12 ℓ): xx -->[ # F (f · identity y)] pr1 ℓ
minv:= transportf (mor_disp yy (pr1 ℓ))
  (functor_id F y)
  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff 
     (identity y) minv'): yy -->[ identity (F y)] pr1 ℓ
(λ _ : minv ;; m =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
         (pr2
            (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
               (identity_is_z_iso (F y))))
         (id_disp yy),
 m ;; minv =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx)
      (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx))
   (pr1
      (make_z_iso' (identity (F y))
         (identity_is_z_iso (F y))))
   (id_disp (opcleaving_ob HD (# F f) xx))) op_minv_m
 apply op_m_minv.
  Defined.
End IsOpCartesianFromReindexDispCat.

(**
 5. Cleaving
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
cleaving (reindex_disp_cat F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
cleaving (reindex_disp_cat F D)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
cartesian_lift d f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
cartesian_lift d f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
reindex_disp_cat F D y
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
?pr1 -->[ f] d
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
(λ ff : ?pr1 -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff) ?pr10

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
reindex_disp_cat F D y
 exact (pr1 lift).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
pr1 lift -->[ f] d
 exact (pr12 lift).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
(λ ff : pr1 lift -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
  (pr12 lift)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
is_cartesian (pr12 lift)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) (# F f) d: cartesian_lift d (# F f)
is_cartesian (pr12 lift)

    exact (pr22 lift).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
opcleaving (reindex_disp_cat F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
opcleaving (reindex_disp_cat F D)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
opcartesian_lift (reindex_disp_cat F D) d f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
opcartesian_lift (reindex_disp_cat F D) d f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
reindex_disp_cat F D y
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
d -->[ f] ?pr1
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
(λ ff : d -->[ f] ?pr1, is_opcartesian ff) ?pr10

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
reindex_disp_cat F D y
 exact (pr1 lift).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
d -->[ f] pr1 lift
 exact (pr12 lift).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
(λ ff : d -->[ f] pr1 lift, is_opcartesian ff)
  (pr12 lift)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
is_opcartesian (pr12 lift)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
d: reindex_disp_cat F D x
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
lift:= HD (F x) (F y) d (# F f): opcartesian_lift D d (# F f)
is_opcartesian (pr12 lift)

    exact (pr22 lift).
Defined.

(**
 6. Functor from reindexing
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
∏ x : C₁, reindex_disp_cat F D x → D (F x)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, reindex_disp_cat F D x → D (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat F D y) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
∏ x : C₁, reindex_disp_cat F D x → D (F x)
 exact (λ _ xx, xx).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, reindex_disp_cat F D x → D (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat F D y) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D x), xx)
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ ff, ff).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_axioms
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor_data F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_axioms
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor_data F D)

  split ; cbn ; intros ; apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D,
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D
 exact (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor_data F D).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F (reindex_disp_cat F D) D,
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor_data F D)
 exact (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor_axioms F D).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
cleaving D
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
cleaving D
 exact HD.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)
 exact Hff.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff

  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
opcleaving D
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff

  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧

yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx

opcleaving D

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian
  (♯ (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D) ff)
 exact Hff.
Defined.

(**
 7. Mapping property
 *)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_data F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_data F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃ (F₁ x)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         D₁ x → reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃ (F₁ x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F₁ f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃ (F₁ x)
 exact (λ x xx, FF x xx).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         D₁ x → reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃ (F₁ x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F₁ f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), FF x xx)
 exact (λ x y xx yy f ff, ♯ FF ff).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx)
     (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx))
  (functor_id F₁ x)
  (id_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx)
     (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) ff ;; ♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data
                                                 FF)
                                                 gg)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx)
     (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx))
  (functor_id F₁ x)
  (id_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
♯ FF (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (functor_id F₁ x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
♯ FF (id_disp xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₁ x)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₁ x)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))) =
♯ FF (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₁ x)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
?b = ♯ FF (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₁ x)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))) =
?b

      apply transportf_reindex.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x)) (id_disp (FF x xx))) =
♯ FF (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x))
  (id_disp (FF x xx)) = ♯ FF (id_disp xx)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
♯ FF (id_disp xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x))
  (id_disp (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (functor_id (F₁ ∙ F₂) x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x))
  (id_disp (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id (F₁ ∙ F₂) x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
  (! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x))
  (id_disp (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
! functor_id (F₁ ∙ F₂) x =
! functor_id F₂ (F₁ x) @
maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_id F₁ x)

    apply homset_property.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF x xx)
     (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF) ff ;; ♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex_data
                                                 FF)
                                                 gg)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
♯ FF (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
♯ FF (ff ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)) = ♯ FF (ff ;; gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b = ♯ FF (ff ;; gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₁ f g)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)) = ?b

      apply transportf_reindex.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_comp F₁ f g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)) = ♯ FF (ff ;; gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_comp F₁ f g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg) = ♯ FF (ff ;; gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_comp F₁ f g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp (F₁ ∙ F₂) f g) (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_comp F₁ f g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (! functor_comp (F₁ ∙ F₂) f g) (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (# F₁ g) @
maponpaths # F₂ (! functor_comp F₁ f g) =
! functor_comp (F₁ ∙ F₂) f g

    apply homset_property.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_data F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F₁ D₁
          (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_functor_data F₁ D₁ (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F₁ D₁
          (reindex_disp_cat F₂ D₃),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_axioms FF).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex FF) ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex FF) ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category

D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)

HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF

  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ (lift_functor_into_reindex FF) ff)

D₃: disp_cat C₃

FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff

D₃: disp_cat C₃

FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.

Definition lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_data
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₃ : disp_cat C₃}
           {F₁ : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {F₂ : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           (FF : disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃)
  : disp_nat_trans_data
      (nat_trans_id _)
      (disp_functor_composite
         (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
         (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor _ _))
      FF
  := λ x xx, id_disp _.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_data FF)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_data FF)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) x y
     f) (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (id_right (# F₂ (# F₁ f))) (♯ FF ff) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) x y
     f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_left (# F₂ (# F₁ f))) (♯ FF ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_right (# F₂ (# F₁ f))) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) x
       y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! id_left (# F₂ (# F₁ f))) (♯ FF ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_right (# F₂ (# F₁ f))) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! id_left (# F₂ (# F₁ f)) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) x
       y f) (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! id_right (# F₂ (# F₁ f)) =
! id_left (# F₂ (# F₁ f)) @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) x y f

  apply homset_property.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
  (disp_functor_composite
     (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
  (disp_functor_composite
     (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
  (disp_functor_composite
     (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
         (disp_functor_composite
            (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
            (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
  (disp_functor_composite
     (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_data FF).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id (F₁ ∙ F₂))
         (disp_functor_composite
            (lift_functor_into_reindex FF)
            (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F₂ D₃)) FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_data FF)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_commute_axioms FF).
Defined.

Definition lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_data
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₃ : disp_cat C₃}
           {F₁ F₁' : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {α : F₁ ⟹ F₁'}
           {F₂ : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           {FF₁ : disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃}
           {FF₂ : disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃}
           (αα : disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α _) FF₁ FF₂)
  : disp_nat_trans_data
      α
      (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF₁)
      (lift_functor_into_reindex_data FF₂)
  := λ x xx, αα x xx.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_data αα)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_data αα)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy = ?t2

    exact (disp_nat_trans_ax αα ff).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f)
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f)
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
   ! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff))

D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
