FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
   ! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
   ! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) = ?b

    apply transportf_reindex.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (maponpaths # F₂ (! nat_trans_ax α x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f))
     (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
   ! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f) @
   maponpaths # F₂ (! nat_trans_ax α x y f))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
   ! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! functor_comp F₂ (α x) (# F₁' f) @
maponpaths # F₂ (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) =
! nat_trans_ax (post_whisker α F₂) x y f @
! functor_comp F₂ (# F₁ f) (α y)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans α (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans α (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_data α (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α
         (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
         (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_data α (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_data αα).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₃: disp_cat C₃
F₁, F₁': C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₁'
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF₁: disp_functor (F₁ ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
FF₂: disp_functor (F₁' ∙ F₂) D₁ D₃
αα: disp_nat_trans (post_whisker α F₂) FF₁ FF₂
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α
         (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₁)
         (lift_functor_into_reindex FF₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_data αα)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex_disp_nat_trans_axioms αα).
Defined.

(**
 8. Reindexing along opfibrations gives pullbacks
 *)
Section ReindexIsPB.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (D₂ : disp_cat C₂)
          (HD₂ : iso_cleaving D₂).

  (** Universal property for functors *)
  Context {C₀ : category}
          (G : C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂)
          (H : C₀ ⟶ C₁)
          (α : nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
functor_data C₀
  (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
functor_data C₀
  (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
C₀ → total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
∏ a b : C₀,
C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂) ⟦ ?F a, ?F b
  ⟧

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
C₀ → total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
 exact (λ x, H x
                    ,,
                    pr1 (HD₂ _ _ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
∏ a b : C₀,
C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
  ⟦ (λ x : C₀,
     H x,,
     pr1
       (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
      a,
  (λ x : C₀,
   H x,,
   pr1
     (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
    b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2
  (H x,,
   pr1
     (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))) -->[
# H f] pr2
         (H y,,
          pr1
            (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y) ((H ∙ F) y)
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
               (pr2 (G y))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# H f) =
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x · pr1 (# G f)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         use z_iso_inv_on_left ;
         refine (!_) ;
         exact (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
is_functor reindex_pb_ump_1_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
is_functor reindex_pb_ump_1_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
functor_idax reindex_pb_ump_1_data
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
functor_compax reindex_pb_ump_1_data

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  ?Goal0
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (identity x)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  (pr2
                                     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x))
                                        (F (H x))
                                        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                           α x)
                                        (pr2 (G x)))))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

pr2 (# G (identity x)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_transpose_right (fiber_paths (functor_id G x))).

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂

x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (G x)) (pr2 (G x)))
     (base_paths (# G (identity x)) (identity (G x))
        (functor_id G x)) (pr2 (identity (G x))) ;; 
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =

  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (G x)) (pr2 (G x)))
     (! base_paths (# G (identity x)) (identity (G x))
          (functor_id G x)) (pr2 (identity (G x))) ;; 
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G x)))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x)))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (identity (G x))) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 (pr2
                                    (HD₂ (pr1 (G x))
                                       (F (H x))
                                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                          α x)
                                       (pr2 (G x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
                (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (identity (G x)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                (pr2
                                   (HD₂ (pr1 (G x))
                                      (F (H x))
                                      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                         α x)
                                      (pr2 (G x)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂

G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (identity (G x)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G x))
                                   (F (H x))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (identity (G x)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G x))
                                   (F (H x))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂

G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

?b =

pr2

                                   α x) (pr2 (G x)))) =

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂

G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

x: C₀
pr2
  (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (identity (G x)) = ?y'

          apply id_right_disp.

     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))

   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))

              (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G x)))

        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))) ;; 
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))

     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 α x)
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (! id_right (pr1 α x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
?b

x: C₀
pr2
  (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;;

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 α x)
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (! id_right (pr1 α x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (id_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))

     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H x) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z] pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (pr1 α x)
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (! id_right (pr1 α x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (identity x))
             (identity (G x)) (functor_id G x))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_id H x))
  (id_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) x) ((H ∙ F) x)
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))))
  (! functor_id F (H x))

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x: C₀
! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) @
cancel_postcomposition (pr1 α x)
  (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
  (! id_right (pr1 α x)) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (pr1 α x · pr1 (identity (G x)))
  (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (identity x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (! base_paths (# G (identity x)) (identity (G x))
          (functor_id G x))) @
! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x x (identity x) @
maponpaths # F (functor_id H x) = ! functor_id F (H x)

        apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
functor_compax reindex_pb_ump_1_data
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# reindex_pb_ump_1_data (f · g) =
# reindex_pb_ump_1_data f · # reindex_pb_ump_1_data g

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# H (f · g) = # H f · # H g
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  ?Goal
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z))))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# H (f · g) = # H f · # H g
 apply functor_comp.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp H f g)
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z))))))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp H f g)
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp H f g)
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (functor_comp H f g)
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
?b

          apply transportf_reindex.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
        (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
        (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
      transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H y), F (H z) ⟧,
         pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))) -->[
         z0] pr1
               (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                  (pr2 (G z))))
        (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g)
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))) ;; pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z0] pr1
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
               (pr2 (G z))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                             (pr2
                                (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                   (F (H z))
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
        (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
        (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
               · inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y)))) ;; 
         (pr2
            (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
               (pr2 (G y))) ;; pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                          (pr2
                             (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                (F (H z))
                                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                   α z) (pr2 (G z))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                          (pr2
                             (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                (F (H z))
                                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                   α z) (pr2 (G z))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))

transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2
  (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G (f · g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z)))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2
  (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G (f · g)) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 (# G (f · g)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_transpose_right
                   (fiber_paths (functor_comp G f g))).
        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (G x)) (pr2 (G z)))
     (base_paths (# G (f · g)) (# G f · # G g)
        (functor_comp G f g)) (pr2 (# G f · # G g)) ;; 
   inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z))))) =

  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;;

                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)

                                                 (G z))))))

D₂: disp_cat C₂

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1

            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @

              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
                (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
                 pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
                (functor_comp G f g))))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;;

                                        (pr2
                                           (HD₂
                                              (pr1
                                                 (G z))

                                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                              (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))) =

  (mor_disp

        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))

         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @

     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))

  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;;
