                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      transportf
        (mor_disp (pr2 (G x))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
        (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          (pr2
                                             (HD₂
                                                (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
        (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
            · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
               · inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y)))) ;; 
                                               transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (pr1
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (# G
                                                 g))
                                                 (inv_from_z_iso
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                               inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
        (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
            · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
               · inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp
              (pr1
                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                    (pr2 (G x))))
              (pr1
                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                    (pr2 (G z)))))
           (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
              (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (compose
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y)))
                    (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             z))))))
           (pr2
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y)))) ;; 
                                                 (pr2

                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))) ;; 
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z))))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
?b

          
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; 
(pr2
   (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
 (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (pr2
                      (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                            z) (pr2 (G z)))))) = ?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y)
     (pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) · pr1 α y)
        (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr2
                                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G y))
                                    (F (H y))
                                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                       α y)
                                    (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (! assoc
       (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
       (pr1 α y)
       (pr1 (# G g)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))

     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))

           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))

              (pr2 (G z)))))

          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) · pr1 α y)
          (pr1 (# G g))
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr2
                                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G y))
                                    (F (H y))
                                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                       α y)
                                    (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z) (pr2 (G z)))))) =
?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category

C₀: category

  (! assoc

        · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))

   ! assoc

   pr2

        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α

C₁, C₂: category

inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (pr2

C₁, C₂: category

C₀: category

inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (pr2

pr2
  (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) =
?y'

          exact (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                   (pr2 (HD₂ _ _ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))))).
        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                        (pr1
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                     (! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) · pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g))
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z)) @
                      ! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y)) (pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g)
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                  α z)))
                     (transportb
                        (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                           (pr2 (G y)))
                        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                              α y))
                        (id_disp (pr2 (G y))) ;; pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                      inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                        (pr2
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                        (pr1
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                     (! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) · pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g))
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z)) @
                      ! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y)) (pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g)
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                  α z)))
                     (transportf
                        (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                           (pr2 (G y)))
                        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y))
                        (id_disp (pr2 (G y))) ;; pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                      inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                        (pr2
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                        (pr1
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                     (! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) · pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g))
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z)) @
                      ! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y)) (pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g)
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                  α z)))
                     (transportf
                        (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                           (pr1
                              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                 (F (H z))
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                        (cancel_postcomposition
                           (identity
                              ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α y) · pr1 α y
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z))
                           (cancel_postcomposition
                              (identity
                                 ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
                                    y))
                              (inv_from_z_iso
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α y) · pr1 α y)
                              (pr1 (# G g))
                              (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α y))))
                        (id_disp (pr2 (G y)) ;; pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                         inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                           (pr2
                              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                 (F (H z))
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α z) (pr2 (G z)))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                        (pr1
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                     (! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) · pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g))
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z)) @
                      ! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y)) (pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g)
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                  α z)))
                     (transportf
                        (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                           (pr1
                              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                 (F (H z))
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                        (cancel_postcomposition
                           (identity
                              ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α y) · pr1 α y
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z))
                           (cancel_postcomposition
                              (identity
                                 ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
                                    y))
                              (inv_from_z_iso
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α y) · pr1 α y)
                              (pr1 (# G g))
                              (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α y))))
                        (transportb
                           (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                              (pr2 (G z)))
                           (id_left (pr1 (# G g)))
                           (pr2 (# G g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                              (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))

        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

x, y, z: C₀

g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
