      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                        (pr1
                           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                     (! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) · pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g))
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α z)) @
                      ! assoc
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y)) (pr1 α y)
                          (pr1 (# G g)
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                  α z)))
                     (transportf
                        (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                           (pr1
                              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z))
                                 (F (H z))
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
                        (cancel_postcomposition
                           (identity
                              ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α y) · pr1 α y
                            · pr1 (# G g))
                           (inv_from_z_iso
                              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                 α z))
                           (cancel_postcomposition
                              (identity
                                 ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
                                    y))
                              (inv_from_z_iso
                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                    α y) · pr1 α y)
                              (pr1 (# G g))
                              (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                      α y))))
                        (transportf
                           (mor_disp (pr2 (G y))
                              (pr2 (G z)))
                           (! id_left (pr1 (# G g)))
                           (pr2 (# G g)) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                              (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
           (! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                 · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
            ! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
                (pr1 α y)
                (pr1 (# G g)
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                  · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                  · pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (identity
                       ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y))
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                     · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                    (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                            y))))))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))
                                                 (! 
                                                 id_left
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (# G
                                                 g)))
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g)) ;; 
                                               inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
           (! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                 · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
            ! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
                (pr1 α y)
                (pr1 (# G g)
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                  · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                  · pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (identity
                       ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y))
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                     · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                    (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                            y))))))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                                                (mor_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))
                                                (cancel_postcomposition
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (# G
                                                 g))
                                                 (identity
                                                 ((G
                                                 ∙ pr1_category
                                                 D₂) y)
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (# G
                                                 g))
                                                 (inv_from_z_iso
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z))
                                                 (! 
                                                 id_left
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (# G
                                                 g))))
                                                (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z))))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))))
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
              (pr2 (G z)))))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
           (! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                 · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
            ! assoc
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
                (pr1 α y)
                (pr1 (# G g)
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))))
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                 (pr2 (G z)))))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
           (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                  · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                  · pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g))
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (identity
                       ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y))
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                     · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
                    (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                            y))))))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp
              (pr1
                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                    (pr2 (G x))))
              (pr1
                 (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
                    (pr2 (G z)))))
           (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
              (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
                 (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (# G g))
                    (identity
                       ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
                     · pr1 (# G g))
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
                    (! id_left (pr1 (# G g))))))
           (pr2
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2
                                                 (# G
                                                 g) ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G z))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H z))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α z)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G z)))))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z) (pr2 (G z)))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (# G g))
           (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
            · pr1 (# G g))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
           (! id_left (pr1 (# G g))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
            · pr1 (# G g))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
            · pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
               · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (! assoc
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
         ! assoc
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
             (pr1 α y)
             (pr1 (# G g)
              · inv_from_z_iso
                  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
           (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   ! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z))))))) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H z) ⟧,
   pr1
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
   z0] pr1
         (HD₂ (pr1 (G z)) (F (H z))
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)
            (pr2 (G z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
             (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
              pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
             (functor_comp G f g))) @
   ! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
   maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g))
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (pr2 (# G g) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                     (pr2
                                        (HD₂
                                           (pr1 (G z))
                                           (F (H z))
                                           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                              α z)
                                           (pr2 (G z)))))))

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y, z: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (# G g))
        (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
         · pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
        (! id_left (pr1 (# G g))))) @
maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y)
         · pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) · pr1 α y
         · pr1 (# G g))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((G ∙ pr1_category D₂) y))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
            · pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
           (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))))) @
maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
     (! assoc
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) · pr1 α y)
          (pr1 (# G g))
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
      ! assoc
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
          (pr1 α y)
          (pr1 (# G g)
           · inv_from_z_iso
               (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)))) @
maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
        (assoc (pr1 α y) (pr1 (# G g))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))))) @
assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
   · (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
  (pr1 α y · pr1 (# G g)
   · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
maponpaths
  (compose
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof y z g) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
   · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
  (# F (# H f)) (# F (# H g))
  (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
! functor_comp F (# H f) (# H g) =
maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
  (assoc (pr1 (# G f)) (pr1 (# G g))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))) @
assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z)) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (pr1 α x · (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g)))
  (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G (f · g)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (! base_paths (# G (f · g))
          (pr1 (# G f) · pr1 (# G g),,
           pr2 (# G f) ;; pr2 (# G g))
          (functor_comp G f g))) @
! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x z (f · g) @
maponpaths # F (functor_comp H f g)

        apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

  (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂))

 exact reindex_pb_ump_1_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category

is_functor reindex_pb_ump_1_data
 exact reindex_pb_ump_1_is_functor.
  Defined.

  (reindex_pb_ump_1
   ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) H
 exact (λ _, identity _).
    
C₁, C₂: category

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

is_nat_trans
  (reindex_pb_ump_1
   ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) H
  (λ x : C₀,
   identity
     ((reindex_pb_ump_1
       ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) x))
 abstract
        (intros x y f ; cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, id_right ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

c: C₀
is_z_isomorphism (reindex_pb_ump_1_pr1 c)

      apply identity_is_z_iso.
  Defined.

  Definition reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2_nat_z_iso_data
    : nat_trans_data
        (reindex_pb_ump_1 ∙ total_functor (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
        G
    := λ x, α x ,, pr12 (HD₂ _ _ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))).

is_nat_trans
  (reindex_pb_ump_1
   ∙ total_functor
       (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) G
  reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2_nat_z_iso_data

C₁, C₂: category

C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (reindex_pb_ump_1
   ∙ total_functor
       (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) f
· reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2_nat_z_iso_data y =
reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2_nat_z_iso_data x · # G f

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# H f) · α y = α x · pr1 (# G f)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y))) ?Goal
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; pr12 
   (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# H f) · α y = α x · pr1 (# G f)
 exact (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y))) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; pr12 
   (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y))) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (H x), F (H y) ⟧,
      pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) -->[
      z] pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
              (pr2 (G y))))
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f)
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y))))) ;; pr12 
   (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y))) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
        (# F (# H f)) (α y)
        (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (pr2
                          (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
      (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   pr2 (# G f) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (pr2
                       (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
   (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
      (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G y)))
     (assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)) (α y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1
              (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
                 (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G y)))
        (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) · α y))
        (pr2
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x))) ;; (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
                                               (HD₂
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (G y))
                                                 (F
                                                 (H y))
                                                 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                                                 α y)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (G y)))))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
                    (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                       (pr2 (G y)))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
                    (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                       (pr2 (G y)))))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (pr2
                         (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                               α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
                    (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
                       (pr2 (G y)))))) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₂ (pr1 (G y)) (F (H y))
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))) = 
?t2

        exact (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                 (pr2 (HD₂ _ _ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y) (pr2 (G y))))).
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportb
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y)) (pr2 (G y)))
                     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
                     (id_disp (pr2 (G y))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; transportf
                     (mor_disp (pr2 (G y)) (pr2 (G y)))
                     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             y)) (id_disp (pr2 (G y))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
              (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x)
              (pr2 (G x)))) (pr2 (G y)))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
        (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
           (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))))
     (pr2
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
      (pr2 (# G f) ;; id_disp (pr2 (G y))))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   (pr2 (# G f) ;; id_disp (pr2 (G y)))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂

α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1
        (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))))
     (pr2 (G y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 α x))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 (# G f)))
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))) @
   assoc (pr1 α x) (pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y)
      · α y) @
   assoc (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f))
     (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 α x · pr1 (# G f)
      · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y))
     (# F (# H f)) (α y)
     (! reindex_pb_ump_1_data_subproof x y f) @
   nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr2
     (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (G x)) (pr2 (G y)))
     (id_right (pr1 (# G f))) (pr2 (# G f))) =
pr12 (HD₂ (pr1 (G x)) (F (H x))
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x))) ;; 
pr2 (# G f)

      apply homset_property.

  (pr1 (reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2 x),,
   pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x))
  (pr2 (reindex_pb_ump_1_pr2 x))
 exact (pr22 (HD₂ _ _ (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x) (pr2 (G x)))).
  Defined.

  (** Universal property for natural transformations *)
  Context (Φ₁ Φ₂ : C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂))
          (τ₁ : Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category _ ⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category _)
          (τ₂ : Φ₁ ∙ total_functor (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
                ⟹
                Φ₂ ∙ total_functor (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
          (p : ∏ (x : C₀), pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)).

C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
nat_trans_data Φ₁ Φ₂

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)

⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ τ₁ x] pr2 (Φ₂ x)

    exact (transportf
             (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
             (p x)
             (pr2 (τ₂ x))).
  Defined.

α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# Φ₁ f · reindex_pb_ump_2_data y =
reindex_pb_ump_2_data x · # Φ₂ f

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# Φ₁ f) · τ₁ y = τ₁ x · pr1 (# Φ₂ f)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y))) ?Goal
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y))
     (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; transportf
                        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ y)),
                               F (pr1 (Φ₂ y)) ⟧,
                         pr2 (Φ₁ y) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ y))
                        (p y) (pr2 (τ₂ y)))) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)
     (pr2 (τ₂ x)) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category

H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (# Φ₁ f) · τ₁ y = τ₁ x · pr1 (# Φ₂ f)
 exact (nat_trans_ax τ₁ _ _ f).

  (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y))
     (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; transportf
                        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ y)),

     (pr2 (τ₂ x)) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)
     (pr2 (τ₂ x)) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y))
     (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; transportf
                        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ y)),
                               F (pr1 (Φ₂ y)) ⟧,
                         pr2 (Φ₁ y) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ y))
                        (p y) (pr2 (τ₂ y)))) = ?b

        apply transportf_reindex.

  (maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y))

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; transportf
                     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ y)),
                            F (pr1 (Φ₂ y)) ⟧,
                      pr2 (Φ₁ y) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ y))

  (! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y))
     (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y))) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)
     (pr2 (τ₂ x)) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y))
     (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y))) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
        (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x))
     (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f)))

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y)) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y) = ?t2

        exact (transportb_transpose_right (fiber_paths (nat_trans_ax τ₂ _ _ f))).
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           ((Φ₁
             ∙ total_functor
                 (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
              x))
        (pr2
           ((Φ₂
             ∙ total_functor
                 (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
              y)))
     (base_paths
        (# (Φ₁
            ∙ total_functor
                (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
           f · τ₂ y)
        (τ₂ x
         · # (Φ₂
              ∙ total_functor
                  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
             f) (nat_trans_ax τ₂ x y f))
     (pr2
        (τ₂ x
         · # (Φ₂
              ∙ total_functor
                  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
             f))) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category

∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           ((Φ₁
             ∙ total_functor
                 (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
              x))
        (pr2
           ((Φ₂
             ∙ total_functor
                 (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
              y)))
     (! base_paths
          (# (Φ₁
              ∙ total_functor
                  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
             f · τ₂ y)
          (τ₂ x
           · # (Φ₂
                ∙ total_functor
                    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F
                       D₂)) f) (nat_trans_ax τ₂ x y f))
     (pr2
        (τ₂ x
         · # (Φ₂
              ∙ total_functor
                  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
             f))) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((Φ₁
          ∙ total_functor
              (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) x))
     (pr2
        ((Φ₂
          ∙ total_functor
              (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) y)))
  (! base_paths
       (# (Φ₁
           ∙ total_functor
               (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) f
        · τ₂ y)
       (τ₂ x
        · # (Φ₂
             ∙ total_functor
                 (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
            f) (nat_trans_ax τ₂ x y f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2
     (τ₂ x
      · # (Φ₂
           ∙ total_functor
               (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) f)) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (! base_paths
       (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) · pr1 (τ₂ y),,
        pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y))
       (pr1 (τ₂ x) · # F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)),,
        pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))
       (nat_trans_ax τ₂ x y f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
   ! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
   maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f)) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
   ! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)))
  (pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
! base_paths
    (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) · pr1 (τ₂ y),,
     pr2 (# Φ₁ f) ;; pr2 (τ₂ y))
    (pr1 (τ₂ x) · # F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f)),,
     pr2 (τ₂ x) ;; pr2 (# Φ₂ f))
    (nat_trans_ax τ₂ x y f) @
maponpaths (compose (# F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)))) (p y) @
! functor_comp F (pr1 (# Φ₁ f)) (τ₁ y) @
maponpaths # F (nat_trans_ax τ₁ x y f) =
cancel_postcomposition (pr1 (τ₂ x)) (# F (τ₁ x))
  (# F (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))) (p x) @
! functor_comp F (τ₁ x) (pr1 (# Φ₂ f))

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
∏ x : C₀,
post_whisker reindex_pb_ump_2
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) x = τ₁ x

p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)

      intro ; apply homset_property.

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
# F (τ₁ x),,
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x) (pr2 (τ₂ x)) =
τ₂ x

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
# F (τ₁ x) = pr1 (τ₂ x)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x))) ?Goal
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)
     (pr2 (τ₂ x))) = pr2 (τ₂ x)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
# F (τ₁ x) = pr1 (τ₂ x)
 exact (!(p x)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (! p x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
      pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x)
     (pr2 (τ₂ x))) = pr2 (τ₂ x)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ z] pr2 (Φ₂ x)) (p x @ ! p x)
  (pr2 (τ₂ x)) = pr2 (τ₂ x)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
x: C₀
isaset (C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  (** Universal property for equalities *)
  Context (n₁ n₂ : Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂)
          (n₁_pr1 : post_whisker n₁ (pr1_category _) = τ₁)
          (n₁_pr2 : post_whisker
                      n₁
                      (total_functor (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
                    =
                    τ₂)
          (n₂_pr1 : post_whisker n₂ (pr1_category _) = τ₁)
          (n₂_pr2 : post_whisker
                      n₂
                      (total_functor (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂))
                    =
                    τ₂).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₁ = n₂

n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁

  (total_functor

  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁

  (total_functor
