C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
has_homsets (total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
∏ x : C₀, n₁ x = n₂ x

      apply homset_property.

q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) x =

pr1 (n₁ x) = pr1 (n₂ x)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x: pr1 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₁ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x: pr1 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₁ x
pr1 (n₁ x) = pr1 (n₂ x)

      exact (q₁ @ !q₂).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (let q₁ := nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x in
   let q₂ := nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x in
   q₁ @ ! q₂) (pr2 (n₁ x)) = pr2 (n₂ x)

   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
pr2 (n₂ x)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
pr2 (n₂ x)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ x0] pr2 (Φ₂ x))
  (base_paths (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x))
     (q₁ @ ! q₂))
  (pr2 (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ x0] pr2 (Φ₂ x))
  (base_paths (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x))
     (q₁ @ ! q₂)) (pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
?b =
transportf
  (λ x0 : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ x0] pr2 (Φ₂ x))
  (base_paths (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x))
     (q₁ @ ! q₂)) (pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
?b

        apply transportf_reindex.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 (Φ₁ x)) (pr2 (Φ₂ x)))
  (maponpaths # F
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
      ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x)) (pr2 (n₁ x)) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (Φ₁ x)), F (pr1 (Φ₂ x)) ⟧,
   pr2 (Φ₁ x) -->[ x0] pr2 (Φ₂ x))
  (base_paths (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))
     (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x))
     (q₁ @ ! q₂)) (pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₂: iso_cleaving D₂
C₀: category
G: C₀ ⟶ total_category D₂
H: C₀ ⟶ C₁
α: nat_z_iso (H ∙ F) (G ∙ pr1_category D₂)
Φ₁, Φ₂: C₀ ⟶ total_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₁: Φ₁ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂ ∙ pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
τ₂: Φ₁
∙ total_functor
    (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
⟹ Φ₂
  ∙ total_functor
      (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)
p: ∏ x : C₀, pr1 (τ₂ x) = # F (τ₁ x)
n₁, n₂: Φ₁ ⟹ Φ₂
n₁_pr1: post_whisker n₁
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₁_pr2: post_whisker n₁
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
n₂_pr1: post_whisker n₂
  (pr1_category (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)) = τ₁
n₂_pr2: post_whisker n₂
  (total_functor
     (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D₂)) =
τ₂
x: C₀
q₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x) = τ₂ x
q₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr2 x: # F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x) = τ₂ x
maponpaths # F
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₁_pr1 x @
   ! nat_trans_eq_pointwise n₂_pr1 x) =
base_paths (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₁ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₁ x))
  (# F (pr1 (pr1 n₂ x)),, pr2 (pr1 n₂ x)) (q₁ @ ! q₂)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.
End ReindexIsPB.

(**
 9. Reindexing of functors
 *)
Section ReindexOfDispFunctor.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          (G : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂).

  Local Open Scope mor_disp.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ x : C₁,
reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
→ reindex_disp_cat F D₂ (functor_identity C₁ x)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
         → reindex_disp_cat F D₂
             (functor_identity C₁ x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C₁))%cat f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ x : C₁,
reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
→ reindex_disp_cat F D₂ (functor_identity C₁ x)
 exact (λ x xx, G (F x) xx).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
         → reindex_disp_cat F D₂
             (functor_identity C₁ x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x)
 (yy : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C₁))%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x),
   G (F x) xx)
 exact (λ x y xx yy f ff, ♯ G ff).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_axioms reindex_of_disp_functor_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_axioms reindex_of_disp_functor_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x),
♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C₁) x)
  (id_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x)
(yy : pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y)
(zz : pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C₁) f g)
  (♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data ff ;; ♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data
                                          gg)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x),
♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity C₁) x)
  (id_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
♯ G
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
♯ G
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_id F x)) (♯ G (id_disp xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_id F x))
  (transportb (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C₂) (F x))
     (id_disp (G (F x) xx))) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_id F x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C₂) (F x))
     (id_disp (G (F x) xx))) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id (functor_identity C₂) (F x) @
   maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_id F x)) (id_disp (G (F x) xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F x) xx))
  (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (G (F x) xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
! functor_id (functor_identity C₂) (F x) @
maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
  (! functor_id F x) = ! functor_id F x

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x)
(yy : pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y)
(zz : pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (reindex_of_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C₁) f g)
  (♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data ff ;; ♯ reindex_of_disp_functor_data
                                          gg)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
♯ G
  (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (functor_comp F f g)
     (ff ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
♯ G
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (! functor_comp F f g)
     (ff ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_comp F f g)) (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportb (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C₂) ((# F)%cat f)
        ((# F)%cat g)) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C₂)
          ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g))
     (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity C₂) ((# F)%cat f)
       ((# F)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
     (! functor_comp F f g)) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (G (F x) xx) (G (F z) zz))
  (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C₁
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) y
zz: pr1 (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
! functor_comp (functor_identity C₂) ((# F)%cat f)
    ((# F)%cat g) @
maponpaths (# (functor_identity C₂))%cat
  (! functor_comp F f g) = ! functor_comp F f g

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
          (reindex_disp_cat F D₁)
          (reindex_disp_cat F D₂),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
  (reindex_disp_cat F D₁) (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
 exact reindex_of_disp_functor_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C₁)
          (reindex_disp_cat F D₁)
          (reindex_disp_cat F D₂),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) reindex_of_disp_functor_data
 exact reindex_of_disp_functor_axioms.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
is_cartesian_disp_functor reindex_of_disp_functor

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
is_cartesian_disp_functor reindex_of_disp_functor

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ reindex_of_disp_functor ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ G ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
cleaving D₁
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
cleaving D₁
 exact HD₁.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HG: is_cartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff
 exact Hff.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
is_opcartesian_disp_functor reindex_of_disp_functor

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
is_opcartesian_disp_functor reindex_of_disp_functor

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ reindex_of_disp_functor ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ G ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
opcleaving D₁
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
opcleaving D₁
 exact HD₁.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₁
HG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff
 exact Hff.
  Defined.
End ReindexOfDispFunctor.

Definition reindex_of_cartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (G : cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂)
           (HD₁ : cleaving D₁)
  : cartesian_disp_functor
      (functor_identity _)
      (reindex_disp_cat F D₁)
      (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
  := reindex_of_disp_functor F G
     ,,
     reindex_of_disp_functor_is_cartesian_disp_functor F G HD₁ (pr2 G).

Definition reindex_of_opcartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (G : opcartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂)
           (HD₁ : opcleaving D₁)
  : opcartesian_disp_functor
      (functor_identity _)
      (reindex_disp_cat F D₁)
      (reindex_disp_cat F D₂)
  := reindex_of_disp_functor F G
     ,,
     reindex_of_disp_functor_is_opcartesian_disp_functor F G HD₁ (pr2 G).

(**
 10. Reindexing of natural transformations
 *)
Section ReindexOfDispNatTrans.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          {G₁ G₂ : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂}
          (α : disp_nat_trans
                 (nat_trans_id _)
                 G₁ G₂).

  Let reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂)
    := λ x xx,
       transportb
         (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
         (functor_id F x)
         (α (F x) xx).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans_axioms reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans_axioms reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₁ ff ;; transportb
                (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
                 G₁ (F y) yy -->[ z] G₂ (F y) yy)
                (functor_id F y) (α (F y) yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         G₁ (F x) xx -->[ z] G₂ (F x) xx)
        (functor_id F x) (α (F x) xx) ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₁ ff ;; transportf
                (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
                 G₁ (F y) yy -->[ z] G₂ (F y) yy)
                (! functor_id F y) (α (F y) yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         G₁ (F x) xx -->[ z] G₂ (F x) xx)
        (! functor_id F x) (α (F x) xx) ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         G₁ (F x) xx -->[ z] G₂ (F x) xx)
        (! functor_id F x) (α (F x) xx) ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf 
     (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition 
           (identity (F x)) 
           (# F (identity x)) 
           (# F f) 
           (! functor_id F x)) 
        (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ G₁ ff ;; α (F y) yy = ?t2

      exact (disp_nat_trans_ax α ff).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (nat_trans_ax
        (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) (F x)
        (F y) (# F f)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) (F x)
          (F y) (# F f)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) (F x)
          (F y) (# F f)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf 
     (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) 
          (F x) 
          (F y) 
          (# F f)) 
     (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))) =
?b

      apply transportf_reindex.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) (F x)
          (F y) (# F f)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
   ! functor_comp F (identity x) f @
   maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f)) (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (G₁ (F x) xx) (G₂ (F y) yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂))
       (F x) (F y) (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (α (F x) xx ;; ♯ G₂ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
  (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
! functor_comp F (identity x) f @
maponpaths # F
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f) =
! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂))
    (F x) (F y) (# F f) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
! functor_comp F f (identity y)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂)
 exact reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C₂
G₁, G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₂)) G₁ G₂
reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   G₁ (F x) xx -->[
   z] G₂ (F x) xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (α (F x) xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₁)
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F G₂)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_data
 exact reindex_of_disp_nat_trans_axioms.
  Defined.
End ReindexOfDispNatTrans.

(**
 11. Pseudofunctoriality of reindexing
 *)
Section ReindexOfId.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (D : disp_cat C₂).

  Let reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_identity _)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor_data F (disp_functor_identity D))
    := λ x xx,
       transportb
         (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
         (functor_id F x)
         (id_disp _).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportb
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
            disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy -->[
            z] disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy)
           (functor_id F y)
           (id_disp
              (disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)
        (functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)) ;; ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (ff ;; transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
            disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy -->[
            z] disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy)
           (! functor_id F y)
           (id_disp
              (disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)
        (! functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)) ;; ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (ff ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)
        (! functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx)) ;; ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (ff ;; id_disp
              (disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx) yy)
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x))
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx) ;; ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp xx
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))
        (id_right (# F f)) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx) yy)
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp
              (disp_functor_identity
                 (reindex_disp_cat F D) x xx) yy)
           (id_left (# F f)) ff)))

  (transportf

     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (transportf

           (disp_functor_identity
              (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))
        (! id_right (# F f)) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D) y
        yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx) yy)
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff)

  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx) yy)
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (disp_functor_identity 
        (reindex_disp_cat F D) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂

(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx) yy)
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff) = ?b

      apply transportf_reindex.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D)
           x xx) yy)
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) ff) =
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D) y
        yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D) x
        xx) yy)
  ((! id_left (# F f) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
      (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
    ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) @
   maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f)) ff =
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D) y
        yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) ff

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(! id_left (# F f) @
 cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
   (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
 ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) @
maponpaths # F
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f) =
! id_right (# F f) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
! functor_comp F f (identity y)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F (disp_functor_identity D))

  (nat_trans_id
