  (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F (disp_functor_identity D))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F (disp_functor_identity D))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F
         (disp_functor_identity D)),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F (disp_functor_identity D))
 exact reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D: disp_cat C₂
reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D) x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity
        (reindex_disp_cat
         F D) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (reindex_disp_cat
        F D))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor_data
     F
     (disp_functor_identity
        D))
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (disp_functor_identity (reindex_disp_cat F D))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F
            (disp_functor_identity D)),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_data
 exact reindex_of_disp_functor_identity_axioms.
  Defined.
End ReindexOfId.

Section ReindexOfComp.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          {D₁ D₂ D₃ : disp_cat C₂}
          (G₁ : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂)
          (G₂ : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₂ D₃).

  Let reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂))
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
           F
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite G₁ G₂))
    := λ x xx,
       transportb
         (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
         (functor_id F x)
         (id_disp _).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff) ;; transportb
                       (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
                        disp_functor_over_id_composite
                          (reindex_of_disp_functor F
                             G₁)
                          (reindex_of_disp_functor F
                             G₂) y yy -->[
                        z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy)
                       (functor_id F y)
                       (id_disp
                          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)) ;; 
      ♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff) ;; transportf
                       (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
                        disp_functor_over_id_composite
                          (reindex_of_disp_functor F
                             G₁)
                          (reindex_of_disp_functor F
                             G₂) y yy -->[
                        z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy)
                       (! functor_id F y)
                       (id_disp
                          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (! functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)) ;; 
      ♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff) ;; id_disp
                          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx -->[
         z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (! functor_id F x)
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)) ;; 
      ♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff) ;; id_disp
                          (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₁)
                             (reindex_of_disp_functor
                                F G₂) y yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
           (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x))
        (id_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx) ;; 
         ♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
        (id_right (# F f)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (disp_functor_over_id_composite
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
              (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
           (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
           (# F (identity x)) (# F f)
           (! functor_id F x))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp
              (disp_functor_over_id_composite
                 (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
                 (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
              (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
           (id_left (# F f)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))

yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity y))

     (transportf

     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃

        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x,

   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data

     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)

        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)))

        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)

         F G₂) x
        xx)

        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data

        C₁))

     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))) =

  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂

G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃

(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data

     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)

        F G₂))

     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp 
     (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) 
  (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))) = ?b

      apply transportf_reindex.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  (maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
           (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
        (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
     (! id_left (# F f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
      ! functor_comp F (identity x) f)
     (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) x xx)
     (G₂ (F y) (G₁ (F y) yy)))
  ((! id_left (# F f) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
      (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
    ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) @
   maponpaths # F
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y
          f)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (G₂ (F x) (G₁ (F x) xx))
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂) y yy))
  (! id_right (# F f) @
   maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
   ! functor_comp F f (identity y)) (♯ G₂ (♯ G₁ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ x
yy: reindex_disp_cat F D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(! id_left (# F f) @
 cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
   (# F (identity x)) (# F f) (! functor_id F x) @
 ! functor_comp F (identity x) f) @
maponpaths # F
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C₁) x y f) =
! id_right (# F f) @
maponpaths (compose (# F f)) (! functor_id F y) @
! functor_comp F f (identity y)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite G₁ G₂))

  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor F

G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃

  (λ z : C₂

        G₁ G₂))
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite G₁ G₂)),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

     (disp_functor_over_id_composite G₁ G₂))

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C₂
G₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₁ D₂
G₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C₂) D₂ D₃
reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data:= λ (x : C₁)
(xx : reindex_disp_cat
        F D₁ x),
transportb
  (λ z : C₂
         ⟦ 
         F x, 
         F x ⟧,
   disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂) x
     xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₁)
        (reindex_of_disp_functor
         F G₂) x
        xx)): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C₁))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₁)
     (reindex_of_disp_functor
        F G₂))
  (reindex_of_disp_functor
     F
     (disp_functor_over_id_composite
        G₁ G₂))
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C₁))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₁)
            (reindex_of_disp_functor F G₂))
         (reindex_of_disp_functor F
            (disp_functor_over_id_composite G₁ G₂)),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_data
 exact reindex_of_disp_functor_composite_axioms.
  Defined.
End ReindexOfComp.
